"'''The Night Beast'''" is a [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and illustrated by [[Al Williamson]], published by the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]] from [[March]] to [[May]] [[1982]]. It was later reprinted in ''[[Amazing Heroes]]'' magazine #24–26.

It was republished and colorized by [[Dark Horse Comics]], beginning on page 16 of [[Classic Star Wars 8|''Classic Star Wars'' 8]], and completing in [[Classic Star Wars 9|''Classic Star Wars'' 9]]. It was later republished on [[StarWars.com]]'s webstrips section of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

==Plot summary==
{{Plot}}

==Continuity==
The March 21 Sunday strip's [[Star Wars Scrapbook]] section featured the bounty hunter [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] but erroneously called him [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]].
